parsermigration-edit-subtitle: iyadoo la adeegsanayo qalabka guurinta falanqeeyaha
parsermigration-pref-help: Tani waxay ku dartaa xiriir dhinaca ah oo siinaya marin loo maro [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Extension:ParserMigration qalab] lagu guuriyo qoraalka bogagga si loogu wareejiyo noocyada cusub ee falanqeeyaha MediaWiki.
parsermigration-parsoid-readviews-select: Isticmaal falanqeeyaha Parsoid ee cusub ee wikitext-ka:
Marka Parsoid la isticmaalo, xiriir dhinaca ayaa la siin doonaa si loo isticmaalo falanqeeye hore haddii ay dhibaato dhacdo.
parsermigration-parsoid-readviews-always: Had iyo jeer (ikhtiyaar lagu soo biirayo)
parsermigration-parsoid-readviews-defaul: Sida ku xusan qaabeynta wiki-ga (caadi ahaan)
parsermigration-notice-body: Waxaad isticmaalaysaa falanqeeyaha cusub ee Parsoid si aad u muujiso boggan. [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Parsoid/Parser_Unification/Migration Wax badan ka baro astaantan].
